name: TEST - Payment Terms Mismatch (CIB)
trigger_condition:
(
  not is_empty(field.payment_terms_match)
  and not is_empty(field.sender_payment_days_match)
  and not is_empty(field.payment_terms_days_match)
  and int(field.sender_payment_days_match) != int(field.payment_terms_days_match)
)

payload.content: The Payment Terms are different from the default Payment Terms of the supplier.
The Payment Terms are different from the default Payment Terms of the supplier.
